name: src/core/engine/renderer/pipeline/tokenizer.ts
src/core/engine/renderer/pipeline/stages/lex.ts
newContents: export const lex = (s: string) => s.split(/(\s+)/).filter(Boolean);

name: src/core/engine/renderer/pipeline/stages/parse.ts
newContents:
import { lex } from './lex';
export const parse = (s: string) => build(lex(s));

name: src/core/engine/renderer/pipeline/stages/emit.ts
newContents: export const emit = (t: Token, scope?: string) => sink.write(t, scope);

name: src/core/engine/renderer/pipeline/highlighter.ts
src/core/engine/renderer/layout/virtualizer.ts
src/core/engine/renderer/layout/measure.ts
newContents: export const measure = (el: HTMLElement) => el.getBoundingClientRect().height;

name: src/core/state/store/atoms/session.ts
oldContents: export const session = atom({ user: null });
newContents: export const session = atom({ user: null, token: '', expiresAt: 0 });

name: src/core/state/store/atoms/user.ts
newContents: export const user = atom<User | null>(null);

name: src/core/state/store/selectors/derived.ts
newContents: export const isAuthed = select((g) => g(session).token !== '');

name: src/api/v2/handlers/users/controller.ts
newContents: export const getUser = (req: Req) => svc.find(req.params.id);

name: src/api/v2/handlers/users/service.ts
newContents: export const find = (id: string) => db.users.byId(id);

name: src/api/v2/handlers/auth/controller.ts
newContents: export const login = (req: Req) => svc.auth(req.body, req.ip);

name: src/api/v2/middleware/rateLimit.ts
newContents: export const rateLimit = (n: number) => (req, res, next) => bucket.take(req.ip, n) ? next() : res.status(429).end();

name: src/ui/components/Button/Button.tsx
src/ui/components/Button/Button.module.css
newContents:
.btn { padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; }
.btn:hover { filter: brightness(1.1); }

name: src/ui/components/Modal/Modal.tsx
newContents:
export const Modal = (p: Props) => createPortal(
{p.children}
, root);

name: src/ui/hooks/useStore.ts
newContents: export const useStore = <T,>(sel: (s: State) => T) => useSyncExternalStore(sub, () => sel(get()));

name: src/utils/format/date.ts
newContents: export const fmtDate = (d: Date) => d.toISOString().slice(0, 10);

name: src/utils/format/number.ts
newContents: export const fmtNum = (n: number, opts?: Intl.NumberFormatOptions) => new Intl.NumberFormat(undefined, opts).format(n);

name: src/utils/collections/deepMerge.ts
newContents: export const deepMerge = (a: object, b: object): object => merge(a, b);

name: config/webpack/plugins/optimize.ts
newContents: export default new OptimizePlugin({ minify: true, treeshake: true });

name: docs/architecture/decisions/0001-fork-pierre.md
newContents:
# 0001 — Fork @pierre/diffs

Status: accepted

We vendor the recovered source instead of tracking upstream.
